ops.title: Cross-repo cc-notes writes get a misleading 'Synced cc-notes refs.' from the turn trigger
ops.description: Hook auto-sync runs in the session repo's cwd, so a cc-notes write into another repo (cd inside a Bash call) syncs the session repo and prints 'Synced cc-notes refs.' while the written repo's ref stays unpushed until its own session or SessionEnd backstop. Found by the v0.25.0 fleet probe (cc-runtime, 2026-07-12). Fix direction: derive the sync target from the written repo (parse the matched command's cwd/cd prefix) or suppress the confirmation when the write happened outside the session repo.

ops.text: a 'cd other-repo && cc-notes note add ...' turn either syncs other-repo or emits no sync confirmation for it
